title.description: The title of the recipe displayed on the recipe page.

image_url.description: URL of an image to display for the recipe.

author.description: The name of the recipe author.

servings.description: The number of servings the recipe makes.

cooking_time.description: The estimated cooking time for the recipe.

external_reference_id.description: An external identifier for the recipe from the partner system.

content_creator_credit_info.description: Information for crediting the content creator on the recipe page.

name.description: The name of the content creator.

url.description: URL to the content creator's website or profile.

expires_in.description: The number of seconds until the generated recipe link expires.

instructions.description: Step-by-step cooking instructions for the recipe.

ingredients.description: The list of ingredients required for the recipe.
